name: Black Walnut Taffy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine molasses, sugar, salt, sweetened condensed milk, water, and butter in a large pot.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until it reaches the hard ball stage (265-270°F).
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
4. Spread chopped nuts evenly on a well-buttered baking sheet.
5. Pour the taffy mixture onto the nuts, spreading to about 1-inch thickness.
6. Allow the taffy to cool until it reaches room temperature.
7. Pull the cooled taffy until it becomes stiff and creamy.
8. Cut into 1-inch pieces using a sharp knife.
9.
